headline: Assessing KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation After Earnings Upgrades And Regional Bank Sentiment Shifts
summary: KeyCorp (KEY) is back in focus after its recent earnings report, which highlighted asset quality, net interest margin, and share repurchases, and drew a wave of analyst upgrades and fresh commentary from high profile market voices. See our latest analysis for KeyCorp. Despite the recent earnings optimism and analyst upgrades, KeyCorp’s latest share price of US$20.47 comes after a 4.88% 1 month share price decline.
